items.title: Spurs shut down OKC in Game 4 to even series
items.summary: Victor Wembanyama set the tone from the beginning of Game 4 on Sunday as the Spurs evened the Western Conference finals at 2-2.

items.title: 'Punched us in our face early': OKC flounders in G...
items.summary: The Thunder turned in their worst offensive performance in years Sunday night in Game 4 as the Spurs evened the Western Conference finals at 2-2.

items.title: Atkinson: Cavs are 'analytically' beating Knicks
items.summary: Kenny Atkinson said the Cavaliers "analytically" have won two of the first three games against the Knicks in the Eastern Conference finals.

items.title: SGA, Jokic, Wembanyama headline All-NBA teams
items.summary: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander of Oklahoma City and Nikola Jokic of Denver were unanimous first-team All-NBA selections, while San Antonio's Victor Wembanyama missed joining them in that club by one vote.

items.title: With Giannis in crowd, Olympiakos wins EuroLeague
items.summary: In a raucous Telekom Center in Athens, Greece, on Sunday, Olympiakos clinched the EuroLeague basketball title, defeating Real Madrid 92-85 in a back-and-forth game that saw the eventual champions fall behind 15-3 in the opening four minutes.

items.title: Moreno pulls out of draft, returns to Kentucky
items.summary: Kentucky freshman center Malachi Moreno, a projected second-round pick in next month's NBA draft, is returning to school for another year.

items.summary: West Ham manager Nuno Espirito Santo is meeting the club's hierarchy amid rumours he will leave the club following relegation to the Championship.

items.title: Mercedes team-mates go head-to-head for F1 crown
items.summary: On The Chequered Flag podcast, former McLaren mechanic Marc Priestley and F1 journalist Rebecca Clancey discuss the rivalry between Mercedes team-mates Kimi Antonelli and George Russell in their bid to top the drivers' championship.
